name: ST Group Food Industries Holdings Limited
summary: ST Group Food Industries Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, owns, operates, and franchises restaurants. The company operates through Food and Beverage Retails, Supply Chain, and Franchise segments. It holds exclusive franchise and license rights to 6 food and beverage brands, such as PappaRich, NeNe Chicken, Gong Cha, Hokkaido Baked Cheese Tart, IPPUDO, and iDarts, as well as owns 2 brand concepts, including PAFU and KURIMU. The company engages in the sale of food and beverages through its owned and operated outlets, sub-franchising and sub-licensing of brands to sub-franchisees and sub-licensees, sale of food and beverage ingredients and other supplies to its franchise network, and installation of electronic dart machines at sub-franchised iDarts outlets. It also procures, manufactures, and distributes food, equipment, and supplies to restaurants and stores. As of 24 June 2020, it had a network of 118 outlets comprising 46 company owned outlets and 72 outlets owned by its sub-franchisees and sub-licensees in Australia, Malaysia, New Zealand, and the United Kingdom. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
